name: Grecian Stuffed Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tops off the tomatoes and scoop out the flesh.
2. Combine the scooped-out tomato flesh with the cooked rice.
3. Add the chopped onion, currants, minced garlic, salt, and black pepper to the rice mixture.
4. Stuff the prepared mixture into each tomato half.
5. Arrange the stuffed tomatoes in a casserole dish.
6. Pour olive oil over the tomatoes.
7. Cover and bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes.
8. Garnish with chopped mint or basil if desired.
9. Serve.
